record.field:
# Check status of invoices stuck in 'submitted' state. submitted_moves = env['account.move'].search([ ('einvoice_status', '=', 'submitted'), ('state', '=', 'posted'), ('move_type', 'in', ['out_invoice', 'out_refund']), ('einvoice_submission_date', '!=', False), ])
from datetime import timedelta as td cutoff = DateTime.now() - td(hours=1) # Only check if submitted > 1 hour ago
for move in submitted_moves: if move.einvoice_submission_date and move.einvoice_submission_date < cutoff: import logging logging.getLogger(__name__).info( 'E-invoice status sync: %s has been in submitted state since %s', move.name, move.einvoice_submission_date ) # In a real implementation, call the authority API to check status. # ZATCA provides a GET endpoint to poll for clearance status.
